parameters.formDescription: Enter a company and get a competitor gap analysis plus a ready-to-post ad campaign, emailed to you within a few minutes.

values.placeholder: (optional) who the campaign should speak to

options.formSubmittedText: Thanks! Your Competitive Edge report is being generated and will land in your inbox in a few minutes.

parameters.text:
=You are a market analyst. From the company's own website text below, identify what the business actually is and craft a web-search query that will surface its DIRECT competitors.

Company (as entered): {{ $('Normalize Input').item.json.companyLabel }}
Website: {{ $('Normalize Input').item.json.companyUrl }}

Website text:
"""
{{ $json.companyText }}
"""

Return:
- company_name: the business's real name.
- industry: a short category (e.g. "specialty coffee roaster", "boutique fitness studio", "B2B payroll SaaS").
- location: city/region if discernible from the text, otherwise an empty string.
- search_query: a short, literal Google query that returns SIMILAR competitors, not this company. Prefer the form "<category> in <location>" when a location exists, otherwise "<category> companies" or "best <category>". Do not include the company's own name.

If the website text is empty or unhelpful, infer the best you can from the company name and URL.

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.text:
=You are a competitive strategy analyst producing a market recon brief for {{ $json.companyLabel }}. Use ONLY the facts in the material below (the company's own site and its competitors' public sites). Never invent specific facts; when a competitor site could not be read, reason cautiously from its name/URL and mark uncertainty by choosing conservative ratings.

TARGET COMPANY: {{ $json.companyLabel }} ({{ $json.companyUrl }})
Its core audience: {{ $json.audience }}

TARGET COMPANY WEBSITE TEXT:
"""
{{ $json.companyText }}
"""

COMPETITORS (discovered via web search):
"""
{{ $json.competitorsBlock }}
"""

Produce a JSON analysis:
- company_descriptor: one short line describing the company (industry · location · what it does).
- company_summary: 2-3 sentences on the company's biggest competitive opening — where it is losing ground and the single strongest angle to win. Address the reader as "you".
- limitations: 3-5 concrete gaps where the company trails competitors. Each { title (short bold phrase), detail (one sentence, cite a competitor where possible) }.
- matrix: a capability comparison.
  - columns: the competitors IN THE SAME ORDER as listed above, each { name, url }.
  - rows: 4-6 capabilities relevant to this industry. Each { capability, subject_rating, competitor_ratings }. subject_rating is the target company's rating. competitor_ratings is an array aligned 1:1 with columns. Every rating is exactly one of: "none", "partial", "have".
- recommendations: 3-5 prioritized moves to beat the market, ordered most-impactful first. Each { title (short bold action), detail (one sentence on how/why) }.
- positioning_angle: one vivid sentence the marketing campaign should run on.
- theme: choose the report's visual skin for this industry.
  - industry: short industry label.
  - preset_key: EXACTLY one of "cozy_warm" (food/drink/hospitality), "fresh_modern" (tech/SaaS/startup), "trust_corporate" (finance/legal/professional B2B), "vital_energetic" (fitness/wellness/DTC), "earthy_craft" (artisan/retail/handmade), or "recon_neutral" (anything else / unclear).
  - accent_hex: a 6-digit hex (e.g. "#a5673f") that fits the brand, or "" to use the preset default.
  - motif_key: one of "beans", "grid", "lines", "radar" matching the vibe.
  - rationale: a few words on why this skin fits.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source: $json.reportHtml, use_print: true, landscape: false }) }}

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "email": {
    "subject": "The Asheville roaster that shows you the farm",
    "body_paragraphs": [
      "Hi there,",
      "Most coffee brands say \"single origin.\" We can show you the exact farm, the elevation, and the grower.",
      "Starting this month our rotating single-origin beans ship to you every two weeks, each box with a card on the farm behind it.",
      "Start your subscription today.",
      "Same beans your neighbors line up for, now on your counter.",
      "— The Meridian team"
    ]
  },
  "linkedin": "We have always believed you should know where your coffee comes from, not as a slogan but as a farm and a grower you can name. This month that transparency leaves the cafe: single-origin subscriptions ship every two weeks with the story of the farm inside every box.",
  "x_post": "Most \"single origin\" coffee won't tell you the farm. Ours will, on a card in every box. Subscriptions ship every 2 weeks. Meet the farm behind your morning.",
  "instagram_caption": "You already know our pour-over. Now meet the farm behind it. Single-origin subscriptions start this month, delivered every two weeks, each with the story of where it grew. Link in bio.",
  "hashtags": ["SpecialtyCoffee", "SingleOrigin", "AshevilleCoffee", "CoffeeSubscription", "KnowYourFarmer"]
}
